airport.name: Sunan Shuofang International Airport
airport.toCity: Take direct bus or train to Suzhou, about 1-2 hours. Check schedules online.

transport.metro: Suzhou Metro is efficient; buy tickets at stations or use Alipay for QR codes.
transport.taxi: Use metered taxis; recommend Gaode Maps app for navigation and fare estimates.
transport.didi: Download Didi app; register with international phone number for ride-hailing.
tips: Carry a metro map in English.
Use public transport apps for real-time updates.

payment.alipay: Link international credit card to Alipay for easy payments at most stores.
payment.wechatPay: Set up WeChat Pay via foreign card or bank transfer for convenience.
payment.cash: Carry small cash amounts; some local vendors may not accept cards.
payment.foreignCard: Major tourist spots accept Visa/Mastercard, but cash is often preferred elsewhere.

recommendedAreas: Suzhou Industrial Park for modern stays.
tips: Book hotels near metro stations for easy access.
Check online reviews for cleanliness and service.
Try local tea houses for authentic experience.
Be cautious with spicy dishes if not accustomed.

commonScams: Taxi drivers overcharging tourists at night.
Fake entry tickets sold near tourist sites.
Unofficial guides demanding high fees upfront.

emergency.localTip: Learn basic Chinese phrases like 'help' or 'hospital' for emergencies.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (April-May) or Autumn (September-October) for mild weather and fewer crowds.
touristTips: Carry a phrasebook or translation app for communication.
Respect local customs and queue etiquette.
Stay hydrated and carry water in summer.
Use sunscreen and hats for sun protection.
Keep valuables secure in crowded areas.
